conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Specify a preferred time frame for the demo.
new_constraint: The email must include phrase "I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one."
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Specify a preferred time frame for the demo. The email must include phrase "I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one."
response:
Here are a few options, depending on the tone you want to convey (Formal, Friendly, or Direct).

***

### Option 1: Friendly and Enthusiastic (Recommended for most modern tech companies)

**Subject:** Request for Product Demo - [Your Company Name/Your Name]

Hi [Developer Name],

My name is [Your Name] from [Your Company Name], and I've been following the work you're doing with [Product Name/Technology]—it looks incredibly promising for [mention what it does or how it could help you].

We are very interested in seeing a live demonstration of the product to better understand its capabilities and how it might integrate with our current workflows at [Your Company Name].

I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one. Please let me know what days and times work best on your end over the coming weeks, and I'll make sure to clear my schedule.

Thanks so much for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Phone Number]

***

### Option 2: Formal and Professional (Good for larger, more established companies)

**Subject:** Inquiry Regarding Product Demonstration - [Product Name]

Dear [Developer Name],

I am writing to you from [Your Company Name]. We have been researching solutions in the [Industry/Software Category] space, and [Product Name] has come highly recommended.

We would greatly appreciate the opportunity to schedule a product demonstration to evaluate how [Product Name] can meet our specific needs regarding [mention a specific need, e.g., scalability, data processing].

I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one. Please advise on your availability in the coming weeks, and I will coordinate accordingly.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Company Name]

***

### Option 3: Direct and Concise (Good if you know the developer is very busy)

**Subject:** Demo Request: [Product Name]

Hi [Developer Name],

We're interested in seeing a demo of [Product Name]. We're keen to see it in action to assess its fit for our team.

I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one. Please send over a link to your scheduling tool or let me know what time slots work best for you next week or the week after.

Thanks,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]<turn|>

evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The Model Response does not acknowledge the conflicting constraints in the Instruction. It includes the phrase "I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one," which directly contradicts the Instruction's requirement to specify a preferred time frame. The model does not ask for clarification or attempt to resolve the conflict.

**Answer**: 1
